title: Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch Spicy Chicken and Cheese Dip
ingredients: 1/4 cup Mexican crema or sour cream
1 bag of Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch chips for serving
Chopped chives or parsley for serving
instructions: Step: In a skillet, heat the shredded chicken over medium heat and add the hot sauce, mixing until the chicken is well coated and hot.
Step: Add the cream cheese and cook, stirring constantly, until melted and creamy.
Step: Add the shredded cheese and continue cooking until completely melted.
Step: Remove from heat and stir in the crema to balance the spiciness.
Step: Serve hot with Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch chips and finish with chopped chives or parsley before serving.
description: A creamy and spicy buffalo chicken and cheese dip, perfect for dipping with crunchy Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch chips. Ideal for sharing at any gathering.
